ast.source: (Optional) e.g. I'm a screenwriter using this vault for research and script development.
ast.target: （可选）例如，我是一名编剧，使用此库进行研究和剧本开发。

ast.source: Permissions: Full access — all tools including bash. Click to change.
ast.target: 权限：完全访问 — 包括 bash 在内的所有工具。点击更改。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Permissions: Standard — files + web, no bash. Click to change.
ast.target: 权限：标准 — 文件 + 网页，无 bash。点击更改。

ast.target: 完全访问 — 包括 bash 在内的一切

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path to the Claude CLI binary. Leave blank to auto-detect.
ast.target: Claude CLI 二进制文件的路径。留空以自动检测。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Press Enter to send. Shift+Enter always inserts a newline.
ast.target: 按 Enter 发送。Shift+Enter 总是插入新行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically resume the most recent session when the panel opens.
ast.target: 面板打开时自动恢复最近的会话。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated extensions for @-mention search (e.g. md, pdf, txt). Use * to match all file types. Add a trailing comma to also include files with no extension.
ast.target: 用于 @-提及搜索的逗号分隔扩展名（例如 md, pdf, txt）。使用 * 匹配所有文件类型。添加尾随逗号以同时包含无扩展名的文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative path to the context file injected at session start.
ast.target: 会话开始时注入的上下文文件的保险库相对路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How many levels of your vault folder/file tree to include at the start of each session. This gives Claude a map of your vault structure (names only — no file contents are read). Deeper trees cost more tokens on the first message of each session. "Off" disables the tree entirely.
ast.target: 在每次会话开始时，包含您的保险库文件夹/文件树的多少层级。这为Claude提供了您的保险库结构图（仅包含名称——不读取文件内容）。更深的树结构会在每次会话的第一条消息中消耗更多令牌。选择“关闭”将完全禁用树结构。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When your context file exceeds this token count, Claude is instructed to compact it before the session ends — summarizing redundant entries and dropping outdated observations. Set to 0 to disable. Typical context files stay well under 4 000 tokens; set a limit if yours grows large over time.
ast.target: 当您的上下文文件超过此令牌数时，Claude会在会话结束前被指示对其进行压缩——总结冗余条目并删除过时的观察结果。设置为0以禁用。典型的上下文文件通常远低于4000个令牌；如果您的文件随时间增长变大，请设置一个限制。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Skip all context injection — no orientation, vault tree, context file, or active note. Reduces session start cost to zero. UI Bridge actions (open file, show notice, etc.) and vault queries will not work in this mode. Skills still work.
ast.target: 跳过所有上下文注入——无定向信息、保险库树、上下文文件或活动笔记。将会话启动成本降至零。在此模式下，UI桥接操作（打开文件、显示通知等）和保险库查询将无法工作。技能仍然有效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When notes are open side by side in split panes, include all visible file paths in the active note context.
ast.target: 当笔记在分屏窗格中并排打开时，在活动笔记上下文中包含所有可见的文件路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When multiple notes are open as stacked tabs in the same pane, include all open tab file paths in the active note context.
ast.target: 当多个笔记作为堆叠标签页在同一窗格中打开时，在活动笔记上下文中包含所有打开的标签页文件路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Canvas files converted to text and injected as context will be truncated at this character limit. Set to 0 for no limit.
ast.target: 转换为文本并作为上下文注入的画布文件将在此字符数限制处截断。设置为0表示无限制。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative folder where "export session to vault" saves notes. Created automatically if it does not exist.
ast.target: “将会话导出到保险库”保存笔记的保险库相对文件夹。如果不存在，将自动创建。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where session files are stored. Leave empty for the default location (Obsidian config folder/bojubot/sessions). Use a vault-relative path (e.g. _sessions) to track sessions in git alongside your notes, or an absolute path to store them outside the vault entirely. Restart BojuBot after changing this.
ast.target: 会话文件的存储位置。留空则使用默认位置（Obsidian配置文件夹/bojubot/sessions）。使用保险库相对路径（例如 _sessions）可将会话与笔记一起在git中跟踪，或使用绝对路径将它们完全存储在保险库之外。更改此设置后请重启BojuBot。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder containing your skill files (.md files). Leave empty for the default location (plugin dir/commands). Use a vault-relative path (e.g. _skills) to keep skills in your vault, or an absolute path. Skills reload each time you open the / menu.
ast.target: 包含您的技能文件（.md文件）的文件夹。留空则使用默认位置（插件目录/commands）。使用保险库相对路径（例如 _skills）可将技能保存在您的保险库中，或使用绝对路径。每次打开 / 菜单时，技能都会重新加载。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Expose each skill as an Obsidian command palette entry (prefixed "Skill: …"). Run "BojuBot: Reload skills" from the palette after adding or removing skill files. Disable if you find the extra commands cluttering the palette.
ast.target: 将每个技能作为Obsidian命令面板条目公开（前缀为“技能: …”）。添加或删除技能文件后，请从面板运行“BojuBot: 重新加载技能”。如果您觉得额外的命令使面板变得杂乱，请禁用此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Controls which vault operations Claude is allowed to perform.
ast.target: 控制Claude被允许执行哪些保险库操作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When off, full access resets to standard when Obsidian restarts.
ast.target: 关闭时，完全访问权限在Obsidian重启后会重置为标准模式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the setup modal on launch when no context file is found. Disable if you prefer to create the file manually.
ast.target: 当未找到上下文文件时，在启动时显示设置模态框。如果您更喜欢手动创建文件，请禁用此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow Claude to trigger Obsidian UI actions — open files, show notices, navigate headings. Claude is instructed to use these proactively after completing tasks.
ast.target: 允许Claude触发Obsidian UI操作——打开文件、显示通知、导航标题。Claude被指示在完成任务后主动使用这些操作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When Claude tries to run a command not in the allowlist, show a prompt offering a one-time allow or the option to add it to the allowlist. If off, unlisted commands are hard-blocked with a notice.
ast.target: 当Claude尝试运行不在允许列表中的命令时，显示一个提示，提供一次性允许或将其添加到允许列表的选项。如果关闭，未列出的命令将被硬性阻止并显示通知。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Write a debug log file to your vault. Useful for troubleshooting. Takes effect on next Obsidian restart.
ast.target: 将调试日志文件写入您的保险库。用于故障排除。在下次Obsidian重启后生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative path for the log file. Defaults to the plugin folder so it stays out of your vault.
ast.target: 日志文件的保险库相对路径。默认为插件文件夹，以便它不会出现在您的保险库中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Normal logs session events and errors. Verbose adds raw stream data and token breakdowns — useful for deep debugging but produces large log files.
ast.target: 普通模式记录会话事件和错误。详细模式会添加原始流数据和令牌分解——适用于深度调试，但会产生较大的日志文件。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 记忆文件大小限制（令牌）

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 将分屏窗格文件作为上下文注入

ast.target: 将技能注册为 Ctrl+P 命令

ast.target: 在重启之间保持完全访问权限

ast.target: 显示上下文文件设置提示

ast.target: 按名称或 ID 搜索…

ast.target: 选择要作为上下文包含的文件…

ast.target: 在 Obsidian 中打开上下文文件进行编辑

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Remove all permanent denials — commands will prompt again
ast.target: 移除所有永久拒绝 — 命令将再次提示

ast.target: BojuBot: 正在后台生成上下文文件…

ast.target: BojuBot: 上下文文件生成遇到错误。请检查调试日志。

ast.name: Notice

ast.name: Notice

ast.target: BojuBot：设置中已禁用“将技能注册为 Ctrl+P 命令”。

ast.source: provide path (tags on a file) or tag (files with a tag)

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将选中文本作为上下文发送

ast.name: text
ast.source: Allow full access for this session
ast.target: 为此会话允许完全访问

ast.name: text
ast.source: Obsidian commands Claude is allowed to run directly. Search and check commands to enable them. Allowlisted commands run immediately; others prompt for approval.
ast.target: Claude 被允许直接运行的 Obsidian 命令。搜索并勾选命令以启用它们。允许列表中的命令会立即运行；其他命令会提示批准。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 没有命令匹配您的搜索。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Vault-relative path for the note (folder will be created if needed):
ast.target: 笔记的保险库相对路径（如果需要，将创建文件夹）：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Help Claude generate a more personalised context file. Tell it a little about yourself and how you use this vault.
ast.target: 帮助Claude生成更个性化的上下文文件。请告诉它一些关于您自己以及您如何使用此保险库的信息。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Add any files Claude should read before generating — e.g. An existing Claude.md, project notes, or style guides.
ast.target: 添加Claude在生成前应阅读的任何文件——例如现有的Claude.md、项目笔记或风格指南。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Compact this session? Earlier messages will be summarized to free up context.
ast.target: 压缩此会话？较早的消息将被摘要以释放上下文空间。

ast.name: text
ast.source: BojuBot requires the Claude Code CLI (included with Claude Pro/Max). Follow the steps below, then click Check again.
ast.target: BojuBot需要Claude Code CLI（包含在Claude Pro/Max中）。请按照以下步骤操作，然后点击“再次检查”。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Open PowerShell (not WSL, not Command Prompt) and run:
ast.target: 打开PowerShell（非WSL，非命令提示符）并运行：

ast.name: text
ast.source: This opens a browser window to authenticate with your Claude account (pro or max required):
ast.target: 这将打开一个浏览器窗口，用于通过您的Claude账户（需要pro或max订阅）进行身份验证：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Already installed and still seeing this?
ast.target: 已安装但仍看到此提示？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Claude Code may not be on the auto-detected path. Enter the full path to your Claude binary below, then click check again.
ast.target: Claude Code可能不在自动检测的路径上。请在下方输入您的Claude二进制文件的完整路径，然后点击“再次检查”。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Error: Claude Code is not authenticated.

ast.name: text
ast.source: Click Open terminal below. Claude Code will launch and open a browser window to log in. If the browser does not open automatically, press c in the terminal to copy the login URL.
ast.target: 点击下方的“打开终端”。Claude Code将启动并打开一个浏览器窗口进行登录。如果浏览器未自动打开，请在终端中按c复制登录URL。

ast.name: text
ast.source: A Claude pro or max subscription is required.
